anchor_descriptions.chest_of_drawers: the usable flat top of the reddish-brown multi-drawer wooden chest immediately beside the floral-covered black digital piano; exclude wardrobes, appliances, and shelves
anchor_descriptions.display_cabinet: the gray glass-front enclosed printer or cabinet beside the brown study desk and sofa; use one narrow interior compartment or shelf, visual capacity small
anchor_descriptions.study_desk: the long brown writing desk beside the sofa and window, with a broad work surface and dark legs; exclude coffee tables, printers, and cabinets
anchor_descriptions.vanity: only the floral-leaf-cloth-covered black digital-piano or narrow-console top; exclude coffee tables, desks, conventional vanities, and wall shelves
anchor_descriptions.wall_shelf: the wall-mounted wooden board with visible black brackets directly above the floral-covered black digital piano; exclude all furniture tops
